items.name: Dahi Puri (6pcs)
items.description: Spicy potato stuffed balls topped with tamarind sauce and yoghurt.

items.name: Samosa Chat
items.description: Smashed samosa, aromatic peas and potato curry, mint yogurt, tamarind sauce, crispy noodles, fresh chilli.

items.name: Grilled Octopus
items.description: Street food style octopus sekuwa - overnight marinated in exotic spices, slow cooked and finished in smokey oak.

items.name: Yellow Fin Tuna Choila
items.description: Overnight marinated yellow fin tuna, exotic herbs, chilli, coriander, mustard oil (cooked medium rare).

items.name: Chilli Chicken
items.description: Himalayan spiced marinated chicken, onion, mix bell peppers, chilli, coriander tossed in schezuan sauce.

items.name: Chilli Prawns (5pcs)
items.description: Australian tiger prawns, onion, bell peppers, chilli, coriander tossed in schezuan sauce.

items.name: Steamed Momo (6pcs)
items.description: Hand wrapped, served with charred tomato chutney. Add authentic Jhol (sesame & yoghurt based soup) or Chilli (szechuan sauce, bell peppers, onion, herbs) style +$2.

items.name: Mushroom Masala Curry
items.description: Mixed mushroom, house made masala paste, aromatic herbs, tomato puree.

items.name: Puri Tarkari
items.description: Puffed deep fried soft roti, peas and potato curry, aromatic spices, yogurt.

items.name: Goat Curry
items.description: Slow cooked farmer style curry, exotic herbs, onion and tomato base.

items.name: Triple Cooked Pork Belly
items.description: Slow cooked master stock, star anise, cinnamon, quick fried and oak tossed in house made aromatic schezuan sauce.

items.name: Pumpkin Salad
items.description: Grilled pumpkin, spinach, creamy feta, roasted walnuts, seed, beetroot and balsamic dressing.

items.name: Daal
items.description: Authentic Nepalese style, two mixed lentils, pressure cooker cooked.

items.name: Royal Butter Chicken
items.description: Slow cooked cashew nuts and tomato sauce, grilled chicken, creamy sauce.

items.name: Seafood Curry
items.description: Slow cooked farmer style curry, exotic herbs, onion and tomato base.

items.name: Crispy Skin Barramundi
items.description: NT farmed barra, potato and cheese roastie, grilled asparagus, roasted carrot puree.

items.name: Biryani
items.description: Exotic Nepali masala, nuts, rose water, fresh herbs, shredded cheese with spiced yogurt.

items.name: Triple Spiced Ice-Cream
items.description: Mango sorbet folded in blend of cardamom, cloves, cinnamon and balanced with rose extract (2 scoop).

items.name: Gajar Ko Halwa
items.description: Deconstructed carrot pudding, slow cooked in butter and milk, berry, cream and sugar dust.
